message:
feat: LISR-3/4 rule registry, manifest/codemod rules, patch primitives

- 7-rule versioned deterministic repair registry (REPAIR_RULES v1.1.0)
- ManifestNormalization (safe) and ApiMigration (aggressive) patterns
- PatchOp enum with 5 primitives: ReplaceModulePath, AddExport,
  RemoveImport, InjectStub, RewriteRequire
- PatchProposal with max_risk gating and confidence scoring
- 126 tests covering all repair infrastructure

Closes: bd-k5q5.9.3.1, bd-k5q5.9.3.2, bd-k5q5.9.3.3, bd-k5q5.9.4.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
